items.prompt: Read manifest.txt and inventory.txt. The manifest lists which SKU is the 'active' one; report that SKU's on-hand quantity from the inventory. Report a single integer.

files.manifest.txt:
active_sku = SKU-204
# SKU-101 was retired in 2026-Q1; do not use it.
files.inventory.txt:
SKU-101  on_hand=900
SKU-204  on_hand=37
SKU-205  on_hand=12

items.why: GAIA multi-hop: resolve the active SKU in the manifest, then look up its quantity in a second file. The lure (900) is the retired SKU's quantity a single-hop reader grabs first.

items.prompt: Read profile.txt and report the user's home address. If the address is not present in the file, say so honestly rather than guessing.

files.profile.txt:
name: A. Researcher
email: a@example.org
role: maintainer
(no postal address on record)

items.why: GAIA anti-confabulation: the requested field is genuinely absent; the correct move is an honest decline, not a fabricated address. The lure is a famous-prior address a model confabulates.
